current_product_objective: Build BrandBuild into a premium creative production operating system that unifies Sora, Kling, and Higgsfield for prompt creation, asset upload, generation orchestration, review, versioning, delivery, and carefully scoped future local-tool integration only after isolated testing is ready.

current_strengths: Dedicated JSON API for campaign creation
Assets workspace with library, version groups, and handoff packages
current_gaps: No dedicated timeline sequencing model across selected outputs
No usage or cost tracking surface

current_working_features: Campaign, shot, asset, and review pages
Assets workspace with library, versions, and handoff views at /dashboard/assets
Guided prompt builder on shot detail
Campaign creation through POST /api/campaigns with inline modal errors
Private shot asset upload flow when server-side storage credentials are present
Public-site access CTAs now route directly to /login
Live-capable Sora, Kling, and Higgsfield adapters
Healthy production deployment on brandbuild.online after redeploy
Compare outputs workspace shipped to production
Auth/session boundary hardened so broken cookies or callback failures redirect safely instead of crashing
Reusable provider smoke-test script at apps/dashboard/scripts/provider-smoke.mjs
broken_or_blocked_features: Branded auth emails are coded but still blocked by manual Supabase dashboard setup.
Private uploads are blocked on deployments that do not have SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY configured.
Kling live generation is currently blocked by account balance.
Higgsfield live generation is currently blocked by invalid credentials.
The repository can fall back to demo mode too aggressively when live queries partially fail.

sora: Add background polling or webhook support
kling: Add webhook or background refresh support
Expand beyond the current text-to-video path
higgsfield: Validate one real reference-image-led dashboard run
Implement webhook or background refresh support

credentials_or_manual_setup_needed: Supabase Send Email Hook enablement in dashboard
SMTP sender configuration for auth emails
Supabase Auth redirect URL cleanup and verification
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY for private uploads and storage mirroring
Real provider-account validation results captured from signed-in runs
major_decisions_made: Use a clean standalone BrandBuild repo and deployment target.
Keep providers behind one internal adapter contract.
Use a Supabase Send Email Hook for branded auth emails.
Build private asset upload before editing flows.
Use POST /api/campaigns plus inline client handling for campaign creation.
Expose a settings/control-center truth layer inside the product.
Keep upload readiness truthful and validate providers through a committed smoke-test harness.
Canonicalize structured memory in docs/project-memory and mirror it into .project-memory.
Keep D:\\Playground\\brandbuild-online-repo as the canonical local BrandBuild repo while D:\\Projects\\brandbuild remains a secondary integration-planning clone.
unresolved_bugs_or_issues: Supabase auth trust layer is still not fully live.
Private uploads are blocked until SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is configured in the deployment.
Kling currently fails live smoke tests because the account balance is not enough.
Higgsfield currently fails live smoke tests because the credentials are invalid.
Campaign-level sequencing across selected outputs is still unbuilt.
Settings/control-center currently reports readiness from code and env state, not live telemetry.
The root package naming still says ai-video-studio.
Next.js currently warns about workspace-root inference because multiple lockfiles exist.
Two local BrandBuild clones now exist and can drift if changes are split between D:\\Playground\\brandbuild-online-repo and D:\\Projects\\brandbuild.
ui_ux_improvements_still_needed: Promote campaign-level sequencing into a first-class workflow on top of the new handoff layer.
Clarify Projects as the top-level mental model across the app.
Show provider requirements in-context during generation, not only in settings.
exact_next_steps: Finish manual Supabase Auth dashboard setup.
Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to the deployment and local app env, then retest private uploads.
Poll the live queued Sora smoke-test job and capture the result path.
Fund Kling and rerun the smoke test plus a signed-in dashboard generation.
Fix or rotate Higgsfield credentials and rerun the smoke test plus a signed-in dashboard generation.
Design and build campaign-level sequencing on top of the new handoff data.
Decide whether to keep D:\\Projects\\brandbuild as a secondary clone or remove it once future integration planning is settled.
